translated: This will probably be uploaded to YouTube at a later date,
so it's perfectly fine to wait for that.
We're always looking for your messages here at AfterTalk.
You can submit them through the official ProSeka Discord channel or via email.
Once the next event starts, please be sure to send yours in!
Just make sure your messages are related to the event.
August is almost over, and once September is through,
the Anniversary Festival will be waiting for us.
We've been busy preparing for it, so please look forward to that as well.
I'd be so happy if you did. August is ending, but the heat is here to stay.
Everyone, please be careful of heatstroke. If you feel like it's too much,
please don't hesitate to get away from the heat.
Keeping cool is the most important thing.
I hope we can all see each other at the Anniversary Festival.
We'll be waiting for you, whether on the stream or at the venue.
Thank you all for watching until the very end.
Let's all survive this summer together. See you all again soon!
